conversation.text: I want a webhook that fans out incoming notifications to different places depending on how urgent they are.
What does each incoming payload look like, and what are the urgency levels?
JSON with `level` ("High", "Medium" or "Low"), `title`, and `message`. Each notification should be forwarded with title + message intact.
High → Microsoft Teams (team ID '9b4c3a2f-1d8e-4f5b-a6c7-8e9f0b1d2c3a', channel ID '19:a1b2c3d4e5f6@thread.tacv2'). Medium → Slack #notifications. Low → email to alerts@ourcompany.com via Gmail.

executionScenarios.name: high-priority
executionScenarios.description: A high-priority notification is routed to Microsoft Teams
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives { "level": "High", "title": "Server Down", "message": "Production database is unreachable" }. The Microsoft Teams node returns a success response.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow routes the high-priority notification to Microsoft Teams. The Teams message contains 'Server Down' and the database message. No other channels receive the message.

executionScenarios.name: medium-priority
executionScenarios.description: A medium-priority notification is routed to Slack
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives { "level": "Medium", "title": "Deployment Complete", "message": "Version 2.5.0 deployed to staging" }. The Slack node returns a success response.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow routes the medium-priority notification to Slack #notifications. The Slack message contains the deployment details.

executionScenarios.name: low-priority
executionScenarios.description: A low-priority notification is routed to email
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives { "level": "Low", "title": "Weekly Report Ready", "message": "The weekly analytics report has been generated" }. The Gmail node returns a success response.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow routes the low-priority notification to Gmail. The email is sent to alerts@ourcompany.com with the report notification.
